title: Locale System
description: Locale profile management for AcoreX: lazy-loaded regional settings (date/time formats, calendar, units, RTL), reactive switching via signals, provider-based extensibility, and deep integration with translation and date-time formatting.
imports: import { AXLocaleService, AXLocaleProfileProviderService, AX_LOCALE_CONFIG, AX_LOCALE_PROFILE_PROVIDERS, AXLocaleProfile, AXLocaleProfileProvider, AXUSLocaleProfile, AXIRLocaleProfile, AXAULocaleProfile } from '@acorex/core/locale';

hints.title: Profile vs translation language
hints.content: A locale profile (AXLocaleService) controls regional formatting, calendar, units, and RTL. Translation strings come from AXTranslationService. Switching profile via setProfile() automatically syncs the active translation language through profileChanged$.

hints.title: Set default locale
hints.content: Override AX_LOCALE_CONFIG in app.config.ts to change the startup locale (default: en-US).

hints.title: Built-in profiles
hints.content: Shipped locales: en-US, en-AU, fa-IR. Each is lazy-loaded on first use and cached.

hints.title: Update document dir for RTL
hints.content: When switching to an RTL profile (e.g. fa-IR), set document.documentElement.dir = 'rtl' alongside setProfile() — the service does not modify the DOM automatically.

types.title: AXLocaleProfile
types.description: Complete regional configuration for a locale.

props.name: localeInfo
props.description: BCP 47 code and metadata. code e.g. 'en-US', timezone e.g. 'America/New_York'.

props.name: calendar
props.description: Calendar system ('gregorian' | 'solar-hijri'), week start/weekends, 12h vs 24h clock.

props.name: formats
props.description: Pattern presets (short/medium/long/full) used by date-time formatters.

type.name: { temperature, distance, weight, volume, speed, area, custom? }

props.name: i18nMeta
props.description: RTL flag and language fallback lists.

props.name: default
props.description: Locale code loaded on app init. Factory default: 'en-US'.

types.title: AX_LOCALE_CONFIG
types.description: InjectionToken<AXLocaleConfig> — provide in app.config to set the default locale.

types.title: AXLocaleProfileProvider
types.description: Plugin interface for registering locale profile loaders.

methods.content:
/**
 * Returns a map of locale code → loader function.
 * Loaders may be sync or async (dynamic import).
 */
provide(): Promise<Record<string, () => Promise<AXLocaleProfile> | AXLocaleProfile>>

types.title: AX_LOCALE_PROFILE_PROVIDERS
types.description: InjectionToken for custom profile providers. Default factory includes AXLocaleProfileProviderDefault.

types.title: AXLocaleProfileProviderService
types.description: Registry that lazy-loads and caches locale profiles from all providers.

methods.content:
/**
 * Loads all registered locale profiles.
 */
getList(): Promise<AXLocaleProfile[]>

/**
 * Loads or returns cached profile for a locale code.
 */
getByLocale(localeCode: string): Promise<AXLocaleProfile | undefined>

/**
 * Returns true if a loader is registered for the code.
 * Note: call after init (e.g. via getByLocale) for accurate results.
 */
has(localeCode: string): boolean

/**
 * Clears registry and resolved caches, re-initializes providers.
 */
reload(): Promise<void>

types.title: AXLocaleService
types.description: Root singleton managing the active locale profile as a signal.

props.name: activeProfile
props.description: Readonly signal of the currently active profile.

props.name: profileChanged$
props.description: Observable mirror of activeProfile for RxJS pipelines.

methods.content:
/**
 * Loads and activates a locale profile by code.
 * Warns to console if the locale is not registered.
 */
setProfile(localeCode: string): Promise<void>

/**
 * Deep-merge a partial profile into the active profile.
 * Overload: apply('formats.date.short', 'YYYY/MM/DD') for dot-path updates.
 */
apply(profile: Partial<AXLocaleProfile>): void

/**
 * Restores the active profile to the state from the last setProfile() call.
 */
reset(): void

content.data:
The @acorex/core/locale package centralizes regional settings that go beyond simple string translation:

• Date, time, and datetime display patterns
• Calendar system (Gregorian vs solar-hijri) and week layout
• Number/currency/contact format hints
• Measurement units and RTL direction

AXLocaleService holds the active profile as an Angular signal. Built-in profiles (en-US, en-AU, fa-IR) load lazily. Date-time formatters, calendar components, translation service, and layout code read from activeProfile() to stay in sync.

sections.title: Integration with Date-Time Formatters
sections.description: How format pipe uses locale profile patterns.

data.content:
{{ today | format: 'date': 'short' | async }}

{{ today | format: 'date': 'long' | async }}

{{ today | format: 'date': { format: 'yyyy/MM/dd' } | async }}

content.data:
AXTranslationService subscribes to AXLocaleService.profileChanged$. When the profile code changes, it calls setActiveLang(profile.localeInfo.code) and emits AXSystemEvents.AXLanguageChanged.

This keeps translated strings and formatted dates/numbers aligned. Typical flow:

1. User selects a locale in your switcher
2. await localeService.setProfile('fa-IR')
3. profileChanged$ fires → translation loads fa-IR strings
4. format pipe and calendar components refresh automatically

Ensure translation JSON files exist for profile codes you support (e.g. assets/i18n/fa-IR/...).
